apimonedas/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release.
Change the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the JDK migration.
apimonedas/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping java.version at 17 would cause compilation failures or incorrect bytecode generation for JDK 21 features.
